name: nognog-v3-mobile
description: N'OG NOG v3 Mobile - Universal Explorer

scripts.copy:web: cp -r ../index.html ../js ../css ../assets ./www/ 2>/dev/null || mkdir -p www && cp ../index.html www/ && cp -r ../js www/
scripts.build:android: npm run copy:web && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.build:ios: npm run copy:web && npx cap sync ios && cd ios/App && xcodebuild -workspace App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Release
